top_signals.title: JPMorgan Sees May as CPI ‘High-Water Mark’ With Fed Set to Hold
top_signals.summary: JPMorgan Asset Management’s David Kelly predicted the Federal Reserve will decide that the latest inflation data aren’t worrisome enough to prompt policymakers to do anything other than stand pat on interest rates next week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Tech Giants Drive Stocks Lower as Oil Rises to $90: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A selloff in the world’s largest technology companies sent stocks lower, with the market also falling as oil climbed amid a flare-up in tensions in the Middle East that threatens a fragile ceasefire deal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Germany welcome in GCAP, but new Leonardo boss warns about timing
top_signals.summary: CEO Lorenzo Mariani said that the advantages of a new partner were extra cash and know-how.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Amazon Inks $17.5 Billion Loan as AI Borrowing Frenzy Ramps Up
top_signals.summary: Soon after selling the biggest Canadian corporate bond sale on record, Amazon.com Inc. inked another multi-billion dollar financing as spending on artificial intelligence soars.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US firms see China as essential despite rising economic and political risks
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
